title: ZIMPLI - 6 x Large Unicorn Surprise Bath Bombs, 6 Surprise Unicorn Toys Included, Bath Toys for Girls, Bubble Baff Bomb Gift Set, Xmas Gift
features: BATH BOMB GIFT SET: Check out other kids toys in the Zimpli Kids store
WHAT YOU WILL RECEIVE: 6 x Large 100g Bath Bomb with 6 x Unicorn Toys inside
OTHER STYLES: Other bath bomb styles available including Dinosaur, Alien, Fruity, Care Bears and Miraculous
CHRISTMAS GIFTS: Christmas style bath bombs available including Santa, Gingerbread and Christmas Ducks
SAFE: All Zimpli Kids Baff Bombz are skin safe, drain safe, easy clean and stain free and are not tested on animals
IDEAL GIFT FOR KIDS: Our Surprise Bath Bombs are the perfect Birthday present or Christmas gift for Children
